disk.title: Disk name
disk.description: Name of the boot disk to be resized.

sizeGb.title: Disk size
sizeGb.description: Target size in GB. Must be larger than template disk size.

items.description: IPv4 address range, in CIDR notation.

bridge.title: Bridge name
bridge.description: Name of network bridge to attach interface to.

mtu.title: MTU
mtu.description: Network device MTU. If set to '1', virtio devices inherit MTU from the attached bridge.

vlan.title: VLAN ID
vlan.description: VLAN ID to tag interface with.

diskFullContainerdTimeout.title: DiskFullContainerd timeout
diskFullContainerdTimeout.description: Determines how long a machine health check should wait for a node with condition DiskFullContainerd=True before considering a machine unhealthy. Use an empty value to not consider this condition.

diskFullKubeletTimeout.title: DiskFullKubelet timeout
diskFullKubeletTimeout.description: Determines how long a machine health check should wait for a node with condition DiskFullKubelet=True before considering a machine unhealthy. Use an empty value to not consider this condition.

diskFullVarLogTimeout.title: DiskFullVarLog timeout
diskFullVarLogTimeout.description: Determines how long a machine health check should wait for a node with condition DiskFullVarLog=True before considering a machine unhealthy. Use an empty value to not consider this condition.

maxUnhealthy.title: Maximum unhealthy nodes
maxUnhealthy.description: Defaults to 40% for control plane nodes and 20% for worker nodes.

nodeStartupTimeout.title: Node startup timeout
nodeStartupTimeout.description: Determines how long a machine health check should wait for a node to join the cluster, before considering a machine unhealthy.

unhealthyNotReadyTimeout.title: Timeout for ready
unhealthyNotReadyTimeout.description: If a node is not in condition 'Ready' after this timeout, it will be considered unhealthy.

unhealthyUnknownTimeout.title: Timeout for unknown condition
unhealthyUnknownTimeout.description: If a node is in 'Unknown' condition after this timeout, it will be considered unhealthy.

pool.description: Name of the resource pool to add VMs to.

sourceNode.description: Name of the initial node to operate against.

storage.description: Name of the storage for the cloned disk.

end.title: VM ID range end
end.description: End of the VM ID range.

start.title: VM ID range start
start.description: Start of the VM ID range.

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Helm values for the provider-independent cluster chart.

dropins.contents:
[Unit]
Requires=coreos-metadata.service
After=coreos-metadata.service
Before=teleport.service
[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
EnvironmentFile=/run/metadata/coreos
ExecStart=/opt/bin/set-hostname.sh
dropins.name: 10-set-hostname.conf

dropins.contents:
[Unit]
After=network.target
[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
ExecStart=/usr/sbin/ethtool -K eth0 tx-udp_tnl-csum-segmentation off
ExecStart=/usr/sbin/ethtool -K eth0 tx-udp_tnl-segmentation off
dropins.name: 10-ethtool-segmentation.conf

global.title: Properties that are available to all charts and subcharts

connectivity.title: Connectivity
connectivity.description: Configurations related to cluster connectivity such as container registries.

containerRegistries.title: Container registries
containerRegistries.description: Endpoints and credentials configuration for container registries.

auth.title: Auth
auth.description: Base64-encoded string from the concatenation of the username, a colon, and the password.

identitytoken.title: Identity token
identitytoken.description: Used to authenticate the user and obtain an access token for the registry.

password.title: Password
password.description: Used to authenticate for the registry with username/password.

username.title: Username
username.description: Used to authenticate for the registry with username/password.

localRegistryCache.title: Local registry cache
localRegistryCache.description: Caching container registry within the cluster.

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: Enabling this will deploy the Zot registry service in the cluster. To make use of it as a pull-through cache, you also have to specify registries to cache images for.

mirroredRegistries.title: Registries to cache
mirroredRegistries.description: Here you must specify each registry to cache container images for. Please also make sure to have an entry for each registry in Global > Components > Containerd > Container registries.

port.title: Service port
port.description: NodePort used by the local registry service.

host.title: Host
host.description: IP for access to the Kubernetes API. Manually select an IP for kube API. Empty string for auto selection from the ipPoolName pool.

ipPoolName.title: Ip Pool Name
ipPoolName.description: Ip for control plane will be drawn from this GlobalInClusterIPPool resource.

port.title: Port number
port.description: Port for access to the Kubernetes API.

ipPoolName.title: Ip Pool Name
ipPoolName.description: Ip for Service LB running in WC will be drawn from this GlobalInClusterIPPool resource.

numberOfIps.title: Number of LB IPs to reserve

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.description: Whether/how outgoing traffic is routed through proxy servers.

httpProxy.title: HTTP proxy
httpProxy.description: HTTP proxy - To be passed to the HTTP_PROXY environment variable in all hosts.

httpsProxy.title: HTTPS proxy
httpsProxy.description: HTTPS proxy - To be passed to the HTTPS_PROXY environment variable in all hosts.

noProxy.title: No proxy
noProxy.description: No proxy - Comma-separated addresses to be passed to the NO_PROXY environment variable in all hosts.

machineHealthCheck.description: Machine health check configuration for control plane nodes.

machineTemplate.title: Template to define control plane nodes

pool.title: Resource pool
pool.description: Name of the resource pool to add VMs to.

sourceNode.title: Source node
sourceNode.description: Name of the initial node to operate against.

storage.title: Storage name
storage.description: Name of the storage for the cloned disk.

caPem.title: Certificate authority file
caPem.description: Path to identity provider's CA certificate in PEM format.

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: OIDC client identifier to identify with.

groupsClaim.title: Groups claim
groupsClaim.description: Name of the identity token claim bearing the user's group memberships.

issuerUrl.title: Issuer URL
issuerUrl.description: URL of the provider which allows the API server to discover public signing keys, not including any path. Discovery URL without the '/.well-known/openid-configuration' part.

usernameClaim.title: Username claim
usernameClaim.description: Name of the identity token claim bearing the unique user identifier.

managementCluster.title: Management cluster
managementCluster.description: Name of the Cluster API cluster managing this workload cluster.

description.title: Cluster description
description.description: User-friendly description of the cluster's purpose.

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: These labels are added to the Kubernetes resources defining this cluster.

servicePriority.title: Service priority
servicePriority.description: The relative importance of this cluster.

nodePools.title: Node pools
nodePools.description: Groups of worker nodes with identical configuration.

machineHealthCheck.description: Machine health check configuration for worker nodes.

pool.title: Resource pool
pool.description: Name of the resource pool to add VMs to.

sourceNode.title: Source node
sourceNode.description: Name of the initial node to operate against.

storage.title: Storage name
storage.description: Name of the storage for the cloned disk.

allowedNodes.title: Allowed nodes
allowedNodes.description: List of nodes to be used for VM deployment.

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: Secret associated with the cloud-controller-manager token ID.

clusterName.title: Cluster name
clusterName.description: Name of the Proxmox VE cluster.

addresses.title: IP addresses
addresses.description: IP address ranges to be used for VMs.

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: Secret associated with the capmox-controller token ID.

release.title: Release
release.description: Information about the workload cluster release.

kubectlImage.title: Kubectl image
kubectlImage.description: Used by cluster-shared library chart to configure coredns in-cluster.
